query:
UPDATE newsletter_editions 
SET published_at = CASE 
  WHEN title LIKE '%Trump%AI%' THEN '2025-12-13 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Tech Layoffs%' THEN '2025-12-10 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Elon Musk%Optional Work%' THEN '2025-11-20 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%xAI%Grok%' THEN '2025-11-18 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Building Credit%' THEN '2025-10-15 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Foster Care to Tech Success%' THEN '2025-09-20 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Mission Forward%Free Tech Training%' THEN '2026-01-15 10:00:00'
  WHEN title LIKE '%Queen Ventures%Community Impact%' THEN '2026-01-10 10:00:00'
  ELSE published_at
END
WHERE published_at < '2025-01-01';
